summary: Iteration-2 testing of multi-org SaaS + Cashfree (MOCK) billing + member mgmt + PDF fix. 42/42 backend tests pass (1 skipped - seed invoice has no due). Found + fixed one CRITICAL backend bug (POST /api/orgs returned HTTP 500 due to MongoDB ObjectId leakage in _create_org_internal). Frontend: login, org switcher dropdown, billing page (plans + status + MOCK notice), settings/team tab all render and integrate correctly. PDF backend path is verified (returns application/pdf + %PDF- header) via test_pdf_with_org_id.

minor.issue: Without X-Org-Id header, falls back to user's first membership; depending on membership order may return 200/404. Spec said 403 'No organization found'. Behaviour acceptable but inconsistent with spec.

Returned org_id is the user's first membership in DB order; after multi-org create the demo owner sees arbitrary 'first' org as active (e.g. TEST_Expired_*). Consider preferring the org where role=owner with subscription_status=active, or the most-recently-active org_id from a user preference.

ui_bugs.issue: Trial/Active badge text reads 'Trial · 7d left' for newly-created orgs even when displayed on the Billing page that itself shows 'Trial · 7 day(s) left' — UI is consistent but badge is hard-coded color amber regardless of status (active should show green). Cosmetic.
Console still spams 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' on first paint for sales-6m + top-products charts. Iter-1 action item not yet addressed.

integration_issues.issue: Browser cached be_org_id from prior test runs (TEST_Expired_495aed) was used; on a clean browser the backend returns first-membership org_id which may not be Vijay Traders. Recommend: backend prefers an active-subscription owner-role org when picking default org_id at login.

issues: Lists 11 orgs (test data pollution from automated tests); needs a cleanup or pagination/search affordance once user has many orgs

action_items: (FIXED by testing agent) Strip MongoDB _id in _create_org_internal after insert_one — POST /api/orgs was returning 500.
Improve login default-org logic: pick best org (active subscription + owner role) instead of arbitrary first membership.
Standardise behaviour for missing X-Org-Id: either always 403 (as spec states) or document the fallback explicitly.
Address pre-existing Recharts width(-1)/height(-1) warning by wrapping ResponsiveContainer in a sized div (h-72 w-full).
Header billing badge: drive colour/text from subscription.status (Trial=amber, Active=green, Expired=red).
Consider TEST_ org cleanup endpoint/script — automated tests now pollute the demo account with multiple orgs.
critical_code_review_comments: _create_org_internal mutated org dict via motor's insert_one and returned it directly — caused ObjectId in JSON encoder. Pattern repeats in many places; recommend a single insert_and_strip helper.
ensure_active_subscription applied to all 12 writes — good; verified via 402 test.
Cashfree webhook does HMAC-SHA256 base64 compare with hmac.compare_digest — secure.
Role guard correctly enforced (sales DELETE /invoices/{id} → 403, verified).
X-Org-Id header is parsed at every request via get_org_ctx — clean middleware-style isolation.
Subscription guard returns HTTP 402 with detail; frontend axios interceptor must redirect to /billing (not verified end-to-end in this iter).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_billeasy.py (added X-Org-Id auto-injection fixture + login assertion update for new response shape)

success_rate.frontend: ~80% (org switcher + billing + team verified; PDF download UI not exercised because the active demo org had no invoices — backend PDF verified)

seed_data_creation: Tests created several TEST_Co_* and TEST_Expired_* orgs under owner@vijaytraders.in. Recommend cleanup script for demo polish.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two pytest files live in /app/backend/tests/: test_billeasy.py (28 tests, all features) + test_multiorg_billing.py (16 tests, multi-org/billing/members/PDF/guard). Both auto-inject X-Org-Id for Vijay Traders. The demo owner now has 10+ TEST_* orgs from prior runs — consider DB reset before next iteration. Frontend org switcher renders all of them. Login default-org is arbitrary, so always verify badge/page is on the expected org before testing. Cashfree MOCK end-to-end (subscribe → /billing/mock-checkout → mock-activate) confirmed working at API level; the mock-checkout UI page was not driven this iteration.
rca_of_the_issue: POST /api/orgs 500: _create_org_internal awaited db.organizations.insert_one(org) but did not strip the _id Mongo injected back into the dict, then returned the dict directly. FastAPI/jsonable_encoder fails on ObjectId. Fix: org.pop('_id', None) after insert. Verified by re-running test_subscribe_mock_then_activate which now passes end-to-end.
